strategies.label: Enable S3 access logging (guided)

fields.description: Name of the S3 bucket that receives access logs (must be different from the source bucket).
fields.impact_text: S3 server access logs will be delivered to the selected dedicated log bucket.

dependency_checks.message: Bucket-scoped target was identified for S3 access logging. This action can stay executable once a dedicated destination bucket is selected.

warnings: Do not use the source bucket as the logging destination.
strategies.impact_text: S3 server access logs will be enabled and delivered to a dedicated destination bucket.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 's3_enable_access_logging_guided' for strategy 's3_enable_access_logging_guided'. Missing tenant defaults: s3_access_logs.default_target_bucket_name.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_low__criticality_medium maps to default recommendation 'direct_fix_candidate'. Risk is low and business criticality is medium. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.65, privilege_level=0.00, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=keyword:log. Relationship context is complete enough for advisory matrix placement. Direct fix is not currently exposed in mode_options, so this stays an advisory candidate rather than an execution gate.
